description_long: This is a military-style helmet with a camouflage fabric cover, featuring several hand-drawn graphics and text. The helmet is adorned with a peace symbol on one side, a skull and crossbones with the phrase 'BORN TO DIE' on the front, and the phrase 'OLD ENOUGH TO KILL BUT NOT FOR VOTING' on the back. There are visible simulated tears and scuffs on the fabric, giving it a worn, battle-used appearance. A set of rifle cartridges is tucked into the helmet band on one side, and the name 'MILLER' is written on the front band. The helmet has a chin strap for securing it to the wearer's head.
description: A military-style camouflage helmet with hand-drawn graphics, text, and rifle cartridges tucked into the band. The helmet features a chin strap and a worn, battle-used appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'BORN TO DIE' text with a skull and crossbones, the peace symbol, and the name 'MILLER' on the band.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rifle cartridges tucked into the band and the 'BORN TO DIE' graphic.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the helmet and the visible cartridges on the left side.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the phrase 'OLD ENOUGH TO KILL BUT NOT FOR VOTING' and the peace symbol.
attribute_graphic_design: Camouflage pattern with hand-drawn graphics including a peace symbol, skull and crossbones, 'BORN TO DIE', 'OLD ENOUGH TO KILL BUT NOT FOR VOTING', and the name 'MILLER'.
